summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/12/2025
Today the most-traded iron ore contract I2605 con nued to fluctuate upward, closing at 768 yuan/mt, up 1.25% from the previousworking day. Traders ac vely sold goods, while steel mills cau ously waited and purchased as needed. Transac ons were mainly driven by steel mill procurement, and the trading atmosphere was sluggish.
